sql: select blockchain as network, concat('0x', lower(to_hex(address))) as address, coalesce(distinct_name, cex_name) as label, 'cex' as category, 'exchange' as entity_type, cex_name as aggregator_label, 'cex.addresses' as aggregator_source, cast(added_date as timestamp) as external_added_at from cex.addresses where blockchain in ('ethereum', 'base', 'arbitrum', 'optimism', 'polygon', 'avalanche_c', 'bnb', 'unichain', 'zora', 'ink', 'blast') and ({{external_added_after}} is null or cast(added_date as timestamp) > cast({{external_added_after}} as timestamp))
